sourceOverview.notes: Qwen3.5 Plus/Max. TTS: Qwen3-TTS (10 languages incl. German, voice cloning). STT: Paraformer. International API via Singapore/US.

audit.priceRangeSummary: Broad pricing spread by model. DashScope commonly offers temporary free quotas for Model Studio activation; omni and realtime speech pricing varies separately from token models.
audit.limitsSummary: Separate international vs mainland modes. Model availability, quotas, and data region behavior differ by mode.
audit.regionSummary: International mode may use Singapore, US Virginia, Frankfurt, or Hong Kong depending on service/mode. Mainland China has separate routing/compliance.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: Multilingual with cross-language same-voice support and dialect options.
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: Multilingual; realtime ASR docs mention multilingual recognition and speech features such as emotion/VAD.
audit.freeTierSummary: Yes: temporary/model-specific quotas are often available.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: For your app, treat DashScope as two logical products: mainland-China vs international. Credential, compliance, and region handling differ.

supplementalResearch.title: 15. Alibaba/Qwen DashScope (China) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 15. Alibaba/Qwen DashScope (China) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. **Best all-in-one Chinese provider for international access.**

**LLMs:** `qwen3-max` ($1.20/$6.00), `qwen3.5-plus` ($0.40/$2.40), `qwen3.5-flash` ($0.10/$0.40), `qwen-plus` ($0.40/$1.20). Free: 1M tokens/model for 90 days.

**TTS:** `qwen3-tts-flash` and `qwen3-tts-flash-realtime` (~$13/1M chars). **10 languages** (ZH, EN, JA, KO, DE, FR, RU, PT, ES, IT). 9+ premium voices. Voice cloning from 3-second audio.

**STT:** `qwen3-asr-flash` and `qwen3-asr-flash-realtime`. **52 languages** + 22 Chinese dialects. Async file transcription up to 12h audio.

**OpenAI-compatible** endpoint: `https://dashscope-intl.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1`. Regions: **Singapore, US (Virginia), Frankfurt, Hong Kong, Beijing**. USD billing. No Chinese phone required.
